Justification: Show current position and route to next job
Request Timing: Ask in context: when opening Map/Route or tapping 'Locate Me'
Degrade Behavior: Graceful degradation: show static map centered on job without live position
User Education Copy: We use your location to show your route. Location is only accessed while you use the map.
